title: Blue vertex handle dots on polygon annotation in 2D viewport
capture_instructions: A polygon annotation must already exist in the scene (created in a previous step or preloaded). In the 2D viewport, the polygon annotation boundary should be visible with blue dots at each vertex. One vertex should be selected (click a blue dot first), showing the move gizmo at that vertex. No new polygon is being drawn.
ui_state: Existing polygon annotation visible in 2D viewport, blue vertex dots shown on all vertices, one vertex selected with move gizmo visible

annotations.label: Blue vertex dot — click to select
Selected vertex — move gizmo appears here
Blue dots = vertex handles — click to select, drag gizmo to move
